title: MkDocs Build Process Workflow
description: Interactive Mermaid visualization for mkdocs build process workflow
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
mermaid
learningObjectives: Sequence the stages of the MkDocs build pipeline from markdown source through plugin processing and theme application to generated HTML
Distinguish between markdown source files in the docs folder and the generated static site output in the site directory
Explain where plugins and theme templates transform content during an mkdocs build
Predict how editing a markdown file or mkdocs.yml propagates through the build pipeline to the final HTML pages
